fa-diamond-half-stroke.appearanceId: rotated square with the left half rendered as an outlined stroke and the right half filled solid; diamond shape divided vertically into an empty outlined portion and a filled portion
fa-diamond-half-stroke.functionalityId: toggles between an empty and filled diamond state; indicates a partially active or half-selected rating element
fa-diamond-half-stroke.intentId: mark something as partially complete or half-rated; represent a half-filled status in a rating or progress indicator

fa-diamonds-4.appearanceId: four small rotated square diamond shapes arranged in a two-by-two grid or cluster; quartet of equally-sized rhombus outlines grouped symmetrically
fa-diamonds-4.functionalityId: selects or applies a four-diamond pattern or tier rating; marks a premium or multi-diamond category in a listing
fa-diamonds-4.intentId: assign or display a four-diamond quality rating; access a top-tier or luxury classification in an app

fa-dice.appearanceId: two overlapping cube faces shown in perspective with dots on each visible face; a pair of three-dimensional square dice with pips visible on their top and front sides
fa-dice.functionalityId: rolls or randomizes a game value or selection; triggers a random outcome or chance-based action
fa-dice.intentId: randomize a game result or decision; play a dice-based game action

fa-dice-d10.appearanceId: ten-sided polygon or pentagonal trapezoidal polyhedron outline with a numeral or facets visible; elongated diamond-like polyhedral shape with angled facet lines suggesting a d10
fa-dice-d10.functionalityId: rolls a ten-sided die for a tabletop RPG or game mechanic; selects a d10 die type in a dice roller interface
fa-dice-d10.intentId: generate a random number from one to ten; choose a ten-sided die in a role-playing game session

fa-dice-d12.appearanceId: twelve-sided dodecahedron outline with pentagonal facets and internal edge lines; a roughly spherical polyhedral shape with multiple five-sided face divisions
fa-dice-d12.functionalityId: rolls a twelve-sided die for a tabletop RPG mechanic; selects a d12 die type in a dice roller tool
fa-dice-d12.intentId: generate a random number from one to twelve; choose a twelve-sided die in a role-playing game

fa-dice-d20.appearanceId: twenty-sided icosahedron outline with triangular facets and the numeral twenty or face lines visible; roughly spherical polyhedral shape divided into many triangular sections
fa-dice-d20.functionalityId: rolls a twenty-sided die for a critical tabletop RPG action; selects a d20 die type in a dice roller interface
fa-dice-d20.intentId: generate a critical roll in a role-playing game; choose a twenty-sided die for an RPG encounter

fa-dice-d4.appearanceId: equilateral triangular tetrahedron outline representing a four-sided die with edge lines and a numeral or facets; flat-based pyramid shape with three visible triangular faces
fa-dice-d4.functionalityId: rolls a four-sided die for a tabletop RPG mechanic; selects a d4 die type in a dice roller interface
fa-dice-d4.intentId: generate a random number from one to four; choose a four-sided die in a role-playing game session

fa-dice-d6.appearanceId: three-dimensional cube shape shown in perspective with visible top and two side faces; square die outline with edge lines suggesting a classic six-sided block
fa-dice-d6.functionalityId: rolls a six-sided die for a board game or RPG action; selects a d6 die type in a dice roller tool
fa-dice-d6.intentId: generate a random number from one to six; choose a standard six-sided die for a game

fa-dice-d8.appearanceId: octahedron outline with a diamond-like double-pyramid shape and triangular facet lines; eight-sided polyhedral shape with a pointed top and bottom and a wide equatorial ridge
fa-dice-d8.functionalityId: rolls an eight-sided die for a tabletop RPG mechanic; selects a d8 die type in a dice roller interface
fa-dice-d8.intentId: generate a random number from one to eight; choose an eight-sided die in a role-playing game session

fa-dice-five.appearanceId: square cube face with five circular pips arranged in an X pattern with one in the center; flat die face outline showing a quincunx arrangement of five round dots
fa-dice-five.functionalityId: represents or selects the value five in a dice game; displays a five-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-five.intentId: indicate a roll of five in a game interface; select or display the number five on a die

fa-dice-four.appearanceId: square cube face with four circular pips arranged in a two-by-two corner pattern; flat die face outline showing four round dots at each corner
fa-dice-four.functionalityId: represents or selects the value four in a dice game; displays a four-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-four.intentId: indicate a roll of four in a game interface; select or display the number four on a die

fa-dice-one.appearanceId: square cube face with a single circular pip centered on the face; flat die face outline showing one round dot in the middle
fa-dice-one.functionalityId: represents or selects the value one in a dice game; displays a single-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-one.intentId: indicate a roll of one in a game interface; select or display the number one on a die

fa-dice-six.appearanceId: square cube face with six circular pips arranged in two vertical columns of three; flat die face outline showing six evenly-spaced round dots
fa-dice-six.functionalityId: represents or selects the value six in a dice game; displays a six-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-six.intentId: indicate a roll of six in a game interface; select or display the maximum number on a die

fa-dice-three.appearanceId: square cube face with three circular pips arranged diagonally from corner to corner; flat die face outline showing three round dots in a diagonal line
fa-dice-three.functionalityId: represents or selects the value three in a dice game; displays a three-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-three.intentId: indicate a roll of three in a game interface; select or display the number three on a die

fa-dice-two.appearanceId: square cube face with two circular pips placed at opposite corners; flat die face outline showing two round dots in a diagonal arrangement
fa-dice-two.functionalityId: represents or selects the value two in a dice game; displays a two-pip result on a standard die face
fa-dice-two.intentId: indicate a roll of two in a game interface; select or display the number two on a die

fa-digging.appearanceId: human figure bent forward holding a shovel or spade with the blade angled into the ground; stick-like person silhouette in a digging posture with a long-handled tool
fa-digging.functionalityId: marks an excavation, construction, or earthwork activity; indicates a work-in-progress or under-construction status
fa-digging.intentId: flag a construction or digging zone; indicate that work is currently in progress at a location

fa-digital-tachograph.appearanceId: rectangular device face with a dial or speed gauge arc and a small chart or graph strip below; instrument panel outline showing a curved meter and a recording strip element
fa-digital-tachograph.functionalityId: accesses vehicle speed recording or tachograph data; displays driver log or fleet tracking information
fa-digital-tachograph.intentId: review vehicle speed and driver log data; manage fleet compliance or tachograph records

fa-dinosaur.appearanceId: side-profile silhouette of a dinosaur with a long neck, small front arms, large hind legs, and a tapering tail; reptilian creature outline with a distinctive upright or crouching stance
fa-dinosaur.functionalityId: marks a dinosaur-themed game character or exhibit entry; navigates to prehistoric or paleontology-related content
fa-dinosaur.intentId: access dinosaur or prehistoric content in an app or game; select a dinosaur character or category

fa-diploma.appearanceId: rolled or folded scroll with a ribbon or seal at the center; rectangular certificate outline with a decorative band tied around it
fa-diploma.functionalityId: opens a certificate, credential, or academic record; marks an achievement or qualification earned
fa-diploma.intentId: view or share an academic certificate or diploma; access earned credentials or course completion records

fa-directions.appearanceId: rectangular road sign shape with an arrow pointing to the right or left and text-placeholder lines; directional signpost outline with a pointed end and a horizontal bar
fa-directions.functionalityId: opens turn-by-turn navigation or route directions; launches a map or wayfinding interface
fa-directions.intentId: get directions to a destination; start navigation to a chosen location

fa-disc-drive.appearanceId: rectangular bay or slot shape with a horizontal slit opening and an eject button or indicator; flat drive housing outline with a disc-insertion slot and a small circular control
fa-disc-drive.functionalityId: opens or ejects an optical disc drive; accesses disc media playback or reading functions
fa-disc-drive.intentId: insert, eject, or manage an optical disc or drive; access disc-based media or storage

fa-disease.appearanceId: irregular amoeba-like blob or cell shape with small spikes or protrusions around its perimeter; organic circular outline with bumpy or spiky surface edges suggesting a pathogen
fa-disease.functionalityId: marks a disease, illness, or health condition category; indicates a medical alert or infection-related status
fa-disease.intentId: access disease information or health condition details; flag or track an illness or medical condition

fa-display.appearanceId: rectangular monitor screen with a thin bezel, a flat base or stand below, and an empty screen area; desktop display outline with a horizontal foot or pedestal
fa-display.functionalityId: opens display settings or screen configuration; represents a monitor device in a hardware or settings panel
fa-display.intentId: adjust screen or display settings; manage a connected monitor or display device

fa-display-arrow-down.appearanceId: rectangular monitor screen with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid on or below the screen area; display outline combined with a vertical shaft and arrowhead pointing down
fa-display-arrow-down.functionalityId: downloads content or data to the display device; sends a file or media from the cloud to the screen
fa-display-arrow-down.intentId: download or receive content onto a display device; transfer data from a remote source to the screen

fa-display-chart-up.appearanceId: rectangular monitor screen containing a line or bar chart with an upward-trending curve; display outline with a rising graph visible on the screen area
fa-display-chart-up.functionalityId: opens a dashboard or data visualization on screen; displays an upward performance trend on a monitor
fa-display-chart-up.intentId: view analytics or performance metrics on a display; monitor growing trends in a data dashboard

fa-display-chart-up-circle-currency.appearanceId: rectangular monitor with an upward-trending chart on screen and a small circle containing a generic currency symbol in the corner; display outline combined with a rising graph and a coin-like badge
fa-display-chart-up-circle-currency.functionalityId: opens a financial performance dashboard with currency metrics; displays rising monetary trends on a monitor with a currency indicator
fa-display-chart-up-circle-currency.intentId: track financial growth or revenue metrics on a display; monitor currency-based performance data

fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.appearanceId: rectangular monitor with an upward-trending chart on screen and a small circle containing a dollar sign in the corner; display outline combined with a rising graph and a dollar-sign badge
fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.functionalityId: opens a financial dashboard showing dollar-denominated growth; displays an upward revenue trend on a monitor with a dollar indicator
fa-display-chart-up-circle-dollar.intentId: track dollar revenue growth on a display dashboard; monitor USD-based financial performance metrics

fa-distribute-spacing-horizontal.appearanceId: three vertical bars or rectangles spaced evenly apart between two outer boundary lines; a row of equally-distributed vertical shapes with uniform gaps and flanking rails
fa-distribute-spacing-horizontal.functionalityId: applies equal horizontal spacing between selected layout elements; distributes objects evenly along the horizontal axis
fa-distribute-spacing-horizontal.intentId: evenly space elements horizontally in a design layout; align objects with uniform horizontal gaps

fa-distribute-spacing-vertical.appearanceId: three horizontal bars or rectangles stacked evenly apart between two outer boundary lines; a column of equally-distributed horizontal shapes with uniform gaps and flanking rails
fa-distribute-spacing-vertical.functionalityId: applies equal vertical spacing between selected layout elements; distributes objects evenly along the vertical axis
fa-distribute-spacing-vertical.intentId: evenly space elements vertically in a design layout; align objects with uniform vertical gaps

fa-ditto.appearanceId: two small quotation-mark-like curved marks side by side at the bottom, resembling a close-double-quote or repeat symbol; a pair of downward comma shapes arranged horizontally indicating repetition
fa-ditto.functionalityId: inserts a ditto or repeat mark to indicate the same value as above; marks a repeated entry in a list or table
fa-ditto.intentId: indicate that a value repeats from the row above; mark a duplicate or same-as entry in a list

fa-divide.appearanceId: horizontal line with one dot above and one dot below it forming a division symbol; a short bar flanked vertically by two small circular points
fa-divide.functionalityId: performs or inserts a division operation in a calculator or formula; selects the divide function in a math input field
fa-divide.intentId: divide a number or value in a calculation; apply a division operation in a formula or expression

fa-dizzy.appearanceId: circular face outline with two spiral or X-shaped crossed eyes and a neutral or open mouth; round head shape with swirling or x-mark eyes suggesting dizziness
fa-dizzy.functionalityId: marks a confused, dizzy, or overwhelmed reaction state; indicates a disoriented or stunned character status in a game
fa-dizzy.intentId: express a dizzy or overwhelmed reaction; indicate a confused or disoriented state in an interface

fa-dna.appearanceId: double helix shape with two intertwining curved strands connected by horizontal rung lines; twisted ladder outline with parallel crossbars suggesting a DNA strand
fa-dna.functionalityId: opens a genetics, biology, or genomics feature; indicates a DNA analysis or genetic data section
fa-dna.intentId: access genetic or biological data; navigate to genomics or DNA-related content

fa-do-not-enter.appearanceId: circle outline containing a horizontal rectangle or thick bar across its center; round prohibition sign with a bold horizontal stripe through the middle
fa-do-not-enter.functionalityId: marks an area or action as restricted or off-limits; indicates a no-entry or access-denied condition
fa-do-not-enter.intentId: block access to a restricted area or feature; signal that entry or action is not permitted

fa-dog.appearanceId: side-profile silhouette of a dog with a rounded head, pointed ears, a body, four legs, and an upright or curved tail; canine outline in a standing or sitting pose
fa-dog.functionalityId: navigates to a pet care, dog breed, or animal services section; marks a dog-related category in an app
fa-dog.intentId: find dog-related services, breeds, or pet care information; access a pets or animals section

fa-dog-leashed.appearanceId: side-profile dog silhouette with a leash line extending from the collar area; canine outline in a standing pose connected to a diagonal or looping strap
fa-dog-leashed.functionalityId: navigates to a dog walking, leash, or pet management feature; marks a leashed-pet or animal-control category
fa-dog-leashed.intentId: manage or book a dog walking or leashing service; access pet control or animal management features

fa-dolly.appearanceId: two-wheeled hand truck or dolly outline with a vertical back frame, a horizontal base plate, and two small circles at the bottom; L-shaped cart silhouette with wheels
fa-dolly.functionalityId: indicates a shipping, moving, or freight handling action; marks a warehouse or logistics category in a management app
fa-dolly.intentId: manage shipping, moving, or warehouse logistics; access freight or cargo handling operations

fa-dolly-empty.appearanceId: two-wheeled hand truck outline with a vertical frame and base plate but no load or cargo on it; empty L-shaped dolly silhouette with wheels and no stacked items
fa-dolly-empty.functionalityId: indicates an available or unloaded dolly in a logistics workflow; marks an empty cart state in a warehouse management system
fa-dolly-empty.intentId: signal that a dolly or cart is available and unloaded; manage empty or available freight equipment

fa-dolly-flatbed-alt.appearanceId: flat platform cart with a low horizontal bed surface and four small wheels at the corners; wide flatbed trolley outline with no raised sides and multiple wheel circles
fa-dolly-flatbed-alt.functionalityId: indicates a flatbed cart or pallet mover in a warehouse or shipping context; marks a heavy-load transport action
fa-dolly-flatbed-alt.intentId: transport heavy or bulky items on a flatbed cart; manage flatbed logistics or pallet-moving operations

fa-dolphin.appearanceId: curved streamlined marine mammal silhouette with a pointed snout, dorsal fin on the back, and a split horizontal tail fluke; smooth arching aquatic creature outline mid-leap
fa-dolphin.functionalityId: marks a marine life, ocean, or aquarium section; indicates a dolphin-themed game character or nature category
fa-dolphin.intentId: access marine life or ocean-themed content; select a dolphin character or aquatic category

fa-donate.appearanceId: hand silhouette holding or presenting a heart shape, or a hand beneath a downward-falling coin or currency symbol; palm-up gesture outline combined with a heart or dropping money element
fa-donate.functionalityId: opens a donation or charitable giving form; initiates a payment or contribution to a cause
fa-donate.intentId: make a donation or charitable contribution; support a cause or nonprofit through a giving interface

fa-dong-sign.appearanceId: Vietnamese dong currency symbol resembling the letter D with two horizontal strikethrough bars crossing the vertical stroke; a modified D glyph with double parallel lines through its upper portion
fa-dong-sign.functionalityId: selects Vietnamese dong as a currency option; displays or converts a price into VND
fa-dong-sign.intentId: view or set a price in Vietnamese dong; access currency conversion or financial settings for VND

fa-donut.appearanceId: ring-shaped pastry outline with a circular hole in the center and a rounded toroidal body; doughnut silhouette with a smooth outer edge and an inner circular cutout
fa-donut.functionalityId: marks a food, bakery, or snack category in a menu or ordering app; indicates a donut-themed item or reward
fa-donut.intentId: find or order a donut or pastry item; access a bakery or sweet snack category

fa-door-closed.appearanceId: rectangular door outline with a panel inset, a small circular doorknob on one side, and a door frame border; solid closed entryway silhouette with a handle detail
fa-door-closed.functionalityId: closes or locks a room, session, or access point; indicates a closed or unavailable entry in a navigation panel
fa-door-closed.intentId: close or restrict access to a room or session; indicate that an entry point is shut or unavailable

fa-door-open.appearanceId: rectangular door shape angled open with a visible panel interior and a doorknob, set within a frame; entryway outline partially ajar showing depth and a handle
fa-door-open.functionalityId: opens or enters a room, session, or access point; indicates an available or welcoming entry in a navigation panel
fa-door-open.intentId: enter or access an open room or session; indicate that an entry point is available and accessible

fa-dove.appearanceId: side-profile bird silhouette with spread or folded wings, a small rounded head, and a short tail; smooth-bodied avian outline in a flying or perched pose suggesting a dove
fa-dove.functionalityId: marks a peace, messaging, or communications feature; indicates a harmony or gentle-action status in an interface
fa-dove.intentId: access a peace or messaging feature; indicate a peaceful or gentle intention in an app

fa-down.appearanceId: downward-pointing solid arrow with a broad triangular head and a vertical shaft; bold chevron or filled arrowhead pointing toward the bottom
fa-down.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content downward; navigates to the next item or lower section in a list or page
fa-down.intentId: move down within a list, page, or interface; navigate to lower content or the next item below

fa-down-from-bracket.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with a horizontal bar or bracket above its shaft at the top; vertical arrow with a flat cap or top rail indicating descent from a boundary
fa-down-from-bracket.functionalityId: downloads or imports content from an external source or bracket boundary; moves an item downward from a fixed upper position
fa-down-from-bracket.intentId: download or pull content from an upper boundary or source; import data from an external location into the current view
